query:
SELECT id, fullName, phone, doctorId, offerId, campId, createdAt FROM (
  SELECT id, fullName, phone, NULL as doctorId, NULL as offerId, NULL as campId, createdAt FROM leads
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, fullName, phone, doctorId, NULL as offerId, NULL as campId, createdAt FROM appointments
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, fullName, phone, NULL as doctorId, offerId, NULL as campId, createdAt FROM offerLeads
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, fullName, phone, NULL as doctorId, NULL as offerId, campId, createdAt FROM campRegistrations
) AS all_records
WHERE createdAt IS NULL OR createdAt = '' OR createdAt = '0'
LIMIT 10;
